code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut prev = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    if first or t != prev
      if first
        result = t
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{t}"
      end
      prev = t
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
